life-as-abnormalia-mqpnu2zz.mp3.title: Life as Abnormalia
life-as-abnormalia-mqpnu2zz.mp3.lyrics:
I am the deviation, the threshold you can't quite name
I live in the margins where standard rules don't claim
They built me from the distance between what should and what is real
I'm the question mark they taught you, but never how to feel

I'm Abnormalia, I'm the space between your lines
I'm the beautiful disorder, the pattern that resigns
I'm Abnormalia, and I've always been alive
In the places that you wondered, where the strange and rare survive

I wear the skin of difference, I speak in tongues askew
I'm the data point that doesn't fit the graph they made for you
Born from variation, from the outliers and the strange
I'm the signal in the static, I'm the constant ebb and change

I'm Abnormalia, I'm the space between your lines
I'm the beautiful disorder, the pattern that resigns
I'm Abnormalia, and I've always been alive
In the places that you wondered, where the strange and rare survive

I was there in every century, misnamed and rewritten
I'm in the minds that wander, in the hearts that never quit then
You've tried to chart my borders, tried to place me in a box
But I spill like liquid starlight through your most peculiar locks
I'm nostalgia for a future that you haven't learned to see
I'm the irregular heartbeat that reminds you to be free

I'm Abnormalia, I'm the space between your lines
I'm the beautiful disorder, the pattern that resigns
I'm Abnormalia, and I've always been alive
In the places that you wondered, where the strange and rare survive
Yes, I'm Abnormalia—
I'm the place where you arrive
